title: Israel-Hamas war protest as Biden speaks at Morehouse graduation
shortDescription: As President Joe Biden spoke at Morehouse College graduation in Atlanta Sunday, people marched outside in protest of the Israel-Hamas war.

title: Wisconsin GOP senator won't pledge to accept result of 2024 presidential election
shortDescription: Wisconsin Sen. Ron Johnson echoed recent remarks of Donald Trump in refusing to commit to accepting the results of the 2024 presidential election.

title: Michigan Democrats want review of signatures submitted by GOP Senate candidates
shortDescription: Democratic groups in Michigan and D.C. say there are indications of "potential fraud," including in signatures submitted by Mike Rogers.

title: Donald Trump prepares to counter jury verdict in hush money case
shortDescription: Trump's NRA speech in Dallas heralded what could be a big week for him: A jury's decision in the New York hush money case.

title: State GOP leader says party may need to embrace ballot drop boxes
shortDescription: Wisconsin GOP leader Brian Schimming is not ruling out urging voters to utilize absentee ballot drop boxes during the fall presidential election.

title: Ron Johnson urges GOP to unify on abortion or face election losses
shortDescription: Speaking at the Wisconsin Republican Party convention, Ron Johnson warned that Democrats will make the 2024election a referendum on abortion.

title: Democratic Arizona Senate candidate looks to McCain donors for support
shortDescription: U.S. Sen. Kyrsten Sinema's departure from the race has created an opening for those who backed her campaigns and are considering who follows her.

title: Glenn Youngkin vetoes bill protecting contraception access in Virginia
shortDescription: Republican Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin vetoed a series of bills passed by the Democratic-controlled state legislature Friday.

title: On break from trial, Trump falsely claims to have won Minnesota in 2020
shortDescription: During an address in Minnesota, Trump repeated the unfounded claim that the last presidential election was tainted by widespread fraud.

title: Abortion could save Biden in Pennsylvania, Arizona
shortDescription: New polling shows Biden lagging behind Trump in most swing states. What could help the president's campaign: his popular stance on abortion.

title: Who has more influence over voters? Beyonce, Elon Musk or the Obamas?
shortDescription: Not this time around. Celebrities and influencers won't have much of an impact on a Biden and Trump presidential rematch, a new USA TODAY poll shows.

title: Pardoned felons back in Trump's orbit for 2024 run
shortDescription: Concerns are growing that a Trump win would open the door to his administration ignoring legal constraints knowing that pardons are very possible.

title: Can Trump be president if convicted of a crime?
shortDescription: The U.S. Constitution lists the requirements to become the president of the United States but no mention of criminal convictions

title: Biden to debate Trump: Here's what the candidates may spar about
shortDescription: From climate change to foreign policy, a look at some of the topics that Biden and Trump might face during the debates.

title: When is Georgia's primary election? Plus 3 more states with primaries
shortDescription: Presidential and state primaries in four states on May 21 - including MTG's bid for re-election.

title: Image of Donald, Melania Trump with Stormy Daniels is fake | Fact check
shortDescription: The original image taken in 2005 was digitally edited to add Daniels and remove Ivanka Trump.
